Title: Permits certain members of the state liquor authority or officers, deputies, assistants, inspectors or employees thereof to be a member of a community board of education
Summary: Permits certain members of the state liquor authority or officers, deputies, assistants, inspectors or employees thereof to be a member of a community board of education.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the alcoholic beverage control law, in relation to permitting certain members of the state liquor authority or officers, deputies, assistants, inspectors or employees thereof to be a member of a community board of education
